description_long: This is a realistic representation of a medium-to-large dog with a robust, muscular build and a thick, double-layered coat. The fur is predominantly a mix of tan, gray, and black, with darker shading along the back and lighter tones on the legs, underbelly, and face. The head is wedge-shaped with a strong, pronounced muzzle, erect pricked ears, and alert, forward-facing eyes. The tail is bushy and hangs straight down, and the legs are sturdy and well-proportioned, suggesting agility and strength. The surface texture mimics the look of dense fur, and the overall posture is attentive and naturalistic. No collar or leash is visible, and the dog appears to be modeled after a German Shepherd or similar breed.
description: A lifelike, medium-to-large dog with a thick, tan and black fur coat, pricked ears, and a bushy tail hanging down. The build is strong and athletic, resembling a German Shepherd.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dog's muscular build, thick fur, pricked ears, and bushy tail hanging down.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the bushy tail, broad back, and the symmetrical fur pattern along the spine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the dog's profile, fur texture, and the alert posture of the head and ears.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the wedge-shaped head, erect ears, and strong, straight legs.
